name: real-per-movement-ladder-gorillot-20260722
description: GORILLOT part-C metcon: a round-interleaved descending ladder where each movement has its OWN scheme (Air Squat 50-40-30, twin-DB Push Press 30-20-10, Box Jump flat 15 every round). Stored as sections-per-round (pyramid). The poster must show each round with all 3 movements at their own count that round — never a single collapsed 50-40-30, never per-movement blocks. Push Press is twin DBs (equipment dumbbell) — the load tag must show the LOGGED per-DB weight (15kg ea, breakdown 30 = 2x15), NOT the Rx (20kg from rxWeights) and NOT the doubled 30.

workout.title: For Time
workout.rawText:
METCON (Short)
For time:
[50-40-30] air squats
[30-20-10] twin Dumbbells / Kettlebells push press
* 15 box jumps after each set
< 12 minutes T.C. | WEIGHT: 12/20kg

exercises.name: For Time
exercises.prescription: [50-40-30] Air Squats, [30-20-10] Twin Dumbbell Push Press, 15 Box Jumps after each set
